title: Vector Database Performance Benchmarks 2025
raw_html:
Vector Database Performance Benchmarks 2025

Comprehensive benchmarks comparing Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, and Milvus show significant performance differences for RAG applications.

Benchmark Results

  • Pinecone leads in query latency (12ms avg)
  • Milvus handles largest datasets (100M+ vectors)
  • Qdrant offers best cost-performance ratio
  • Weaviate excels in hybrid search

RAG Implementation Tips

For production RAG systems, consider chunking strategy, embedding model selection, and index optimization. Most teams see 3-5x improvement with proper tuning.
raw_text:
Vector Database Performance Benchmarks 2025

Comprehensive benchmarks comparing Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, and Milvus show significant performance differences for RAG applications.

Benchmark Results:
- Pinecone leads in query latency (12ms avg)
- Milvus handles largest datasets (100M+ vectors)
- Qdrant offers best cost-performance ratio
- Weaviate excels in hybrid search

RAG Implementation Tips:
For production RAG systems, consider chunking strategy, embedding model selection, and index optimization. Most teams see 3-5x improvement with proper tuning.
